chest_pain,shortness_of_breath:160-95-98.action: Immediate cardiac evaluation. Obtain ECG, cardiac enzymes. Consider MI protocol.

chest_pain:180-110-99-98:55-M.action: Hypertensive emergency with chest pain. Immediate cardiology consult.

sudden_weakness,facial_droop,speech_diff.action: Possible stroke. Activate stroke protocol immediately. CT head stat.

shortness_of_breath,wheezing:130-80-99-8.action: Severe asthma exacerbation. Nebulizer treatment, consider steroids.

fever,headache,neck_stiffness:120-70-104.action: Possible meningitis. Immediate lumbar puncture, antibiotics, isolation.

head_injury,confusion,vomiting:110-70-99.action: Possible traumatic brain injury. CT head, neurological monitoring.

facial_swelling,difficulty_swallowing,hi.action: Anaphylaxis. Epinephrine immediately, IV access, airway monitoring.

fever,irritability,poor_feeding:100-60-1.action: Pediatric fever workup. Blood cultures, urinalysis, consider sepsis.

minor_laceration:120-80-98-98:25-M.action: Wound care, tetanus status, consider sutures if needed.

suicidal_ideation,agitation:130-85-98-98.action: Psychiatric evaluation, safety precautions, consider 1:1 monitoring.

headache:190-125-98-98:55-M.action: Hypertensive crisis. Immediate BP management required.

shortness_of_breath:130-80-99-82:70-M.action: Severe hypoxemia. Immediate oxygen therapy and airway assessment.
